quotes.verbatim_quote:
As before, and on all Type 3 altered dominant pages coming up, you may wish to try A7+ for A7#9+
and D49 for D6/9.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Standing chord-substitution rule applied across all Type 3 altered dominant exercises.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Try fingering all these Em9 runs in the Sth position too.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Standing technique instruction to practice the same material in an alternate position, expanding positional fluency.

quotes.verbatim_quote: These notes may be played on other strings too (5th & 4th strings)
quotes.why_load_bearing: Teaches string-choice flexibility when voicing arpeggio notes.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
REMINDER:
not on tip of finger
quotes.why_load_bearing: Left-hand technique reminder against tip-of-finger placement, correcting a common error.
